# xsession

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `xsession`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| ------------------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `xsession.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable X Session. |
| `xsession.importedVariables` | | |
| `xsession.initExtra` | `strings concatenated with “\n”` | Extra shell commands to run during initialization. |
| `xsession.numlock.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Num Lock. |
| `xsession.pointerCursor.defaultCursor` | `submodule` | Alias of home.pointerCursor.x11.defaultCursor . |
| `xsession.pointerCursor.name` | `submodule` | Alias of home.pointerCursor.name . |
| `xsession.pointerCursor.package` | `submodule` | Alias of home.pointerCursor.package . |
| `xsession.pointerCursor.size` | `submodule` | Alias of home.pointerCursor.size . |
| `xsession.preferStatusNotifierItems` | `boolean` | Whether tray applets should prefer using the Status Notifier Items (SNI) protocol, commonly called App Indicators. Note, not all tray applets or status bars support SNI. |
| `xsession.profileExtra` | `strings concatenated with “\n”` | Extra shell commands to run before session start. |
| `xsession.profilePath` | `string` | Path, relative to HOME , where Home Manager should write the X profile script. |
| `xsession.scriptPath` | `string` | Path, relative to HOME , where Home Manager should write the X session script. |
| `xsession.trayTarget` | | |
| `xsession.windowManager.awesome.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Awesome window manager. |
| `xsession.windowManager.awesome.luaModules` | `list of package` | List of lua packages available for being used in the Awesome configuration. |
| `xsession.windowManager.awesome.noArgb` | `boolean` | Disable client transparency support, which can be greatly detrimental to performance in some setups |
| `xsession.windowManager.awesome.package` | `package` | The awesome package to use. to use for running the Awesome WM |
| `xsession.windowManager.bspwm.alwaysResetDesktops` | `boolean` | If set to true , desktops configured in monitors will be reset every time the config is run. |
| `xsession.windowManager.bspwm.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable bspwm window manager. |
| `xsession.windowManager.bspwm.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with “\n”` | Additional shell commands to be run at the end of the config file. |
| `xsession.windowManager.bspwm.extraConfigEarly` | `strings concatenated with “\n”` | Like extraConfig, except commands are run at the start of the config file. |
| `xsession.windowManager.bspwm.monitors` | `attribute set of list of string` | Specifies the names of desktops to create on each monitor. |
| `xsession.windowManager.bspwm.package` | `package` | The bspwm package to use. |
| `xsession.windowManager.bspwm.rules` | `attribute set of (open submodule of attribute set of (boolean or signed integer or floating point number or string))` | Rule configuration. The keys of the attribute set are the targets of the rules. |
| `xsession.windowManager.bspwm.settings` | `attribute set of (boolean or signed integer or floating point number or string or list of (boolean or signed integer or floating point number or string))` | General settings given to bspc config . |
| `xsession.windowManager.bspwm.startupPrograms` | `list of string` | Programs to be executed during startup. |
| `xsession.windowManager.command` | `string` | Command to use to start the window manager. |
| `xsession.windowManager.exwm.enable` | | |
| `xsession.windowManager.exwm.extraPackages` | | |
| `xsession.windowManager.exwm.loadScript` | | |
| `xsession.windowManager.exwm.package` | | |
| `xsession.windowManager.fluxbox.apps` | `strings concatenated with “\n”` | Apps configuration for Fluxbox, written to ~/.fluxbox/apps . Look at the fluxbox (1) manpage for details. |
| `xsession.windowManager.fluxbox.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Fluxbox window manager. |
| `xsession.windowManager.fluxbox.extraCommandLineArgs` | `list of string` | Extra command line arguments to pass to fluxbox . Look at the fluxbox (1) manpage for details. |
| `xsession.windowManager.fluxbox.init` | `strings concatenated with “\n”` | Init configuration for Fluxbox, written to ~/.fluxbox/init . Look at the fluxbox (1) manpage for details. |
| `xsession.windowManager.fluxbox.keys` | `strings concatenated with “\n”` | Keyboard shortcuts configuration for Fluxbox, written to ~/.fluxbox/keys . Look at the fluxbox-keys (1) manpage for details. |
| `xsession.windowManager.fluxbox.menu` | `strings concatenated with “\n”` | Menu configuration for Fluxbox, written to ~/.fluxbox/menu . Look at the fluxbox-menu (1) manpage for details. |
| `xsession.windowManager.fluxbox.package` | `null or package` | The fluxbox package to use. |
| `xsession.windowManager.fluxbox.slitlist` | `strings concatenated with “\n”` | Slitlist configuration for Fluxbox, written to ~/.fluxbox/slitlist . Look at the fluxbox (1) manpage for details. |
| `xsession.windowManager.fluxbox.windowmenu` | `strings concatenated with “\n”` | Window menu configuration for Fluxbox, written to ~/.fluxbox/windowmenu . Look at the fluxbox-menu (1) manpage for details. |
| `xsession.windowManager.herbstluftwm.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable herbstluftwm window manager. |
| `xsession.windowManager.herbstluftwm.enableAlias` | `boolean` | Set an alias for the herbstclient command in the autostart script that only stores its arguments and executes them all at once at the end of the autostart script. |
| `xsession.windowManager.herbstluftwm.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with “\n”` | Extra configuration lines to add verbatim to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/herbstluftwm/autostart . |
| `xsession.windowManager.herbstluftwm.keybinds` | `attribute set of string` | Herbstluftwm keybinds. |
| `xsession.windowManager.herbstluftwm.mousebinds` | `attribute set of string` | Herbstluftwm mousebinds. |
| `xsession.windowManager.herbstluftwm.package` | `package` | The herbstluftwm package to use. |
| `xsession.windowManager.herbstluftwm.rules` | `list of string` | Herbstluftwm rules. |
| `xsession.windowManager.herbstluftwm.settings` | `attribute set of (boolean or signed integer or string)` | Herbstluftwm settings. |
| `xsession.windowManager.herbstluftwm.tags` | `list of string` | Tags to create on startup. |
| `xsession.windowManager.i3.config` | `null or (submodule)` | i3 configuration options. |
| `xsession.windowManager.i3.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable i3 window manager. |
| `xsession.windowManager.i3.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with “\n”` | Extra configuration lines to add to ~/.config/i3/config. |
| `xsession.windowManager.i3.package` | `null or package` | The i3 package to use. |
| `xsession.windowManager.spectrwm.bindings` | `attribute set of string` | Spectrwm keybindings. |
| `xsession.windowManager.spectrwm.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Spectrwm window manager. |
| `xsession.windowManager.spectrwm.package` | `package` | The spectrwm package to use. providing the spectrwm command |
| `xsession.windowManager.spectrwm.programs` | `attribute set of string` | Spectrwm programs variables. |
| `xsession.windowManager.spectrwm.quirks` | `attribute set of string` | Spectrwm quicks (custom window rules). |
| `xsession.windowManager.spectrwm.settings` | `attribute set of (boolean or signed integer or string)` | Spectrwm settings. |
| `xsession.windowManager.spectrwm.unbindings` | `list of string` | List of keybindings to disable from default Spectrwm configuration. |
| `xsession.windowManager.xmonad.buildScript` | `null or absolute path` | Build script for your xmonad configuration. |
| `xsession.windowManager.xmonad.config` | `null or absolute path` | The configuration file to be used for xmonad. This must be an absolute path or null in which case ~/.xmonad/xmonad.hs will not be managed by Home Manager. |
| `xsession.windowManager.xmonad.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable xmonad window manager. |
| `xsession.windowManager.xmonad.enableContribAndExtras` | `boolean` | Enable xmonad-{contrib,extras} in xmonad. |
| `xsession.windowManager.xmonad.extraPackages` | `unspecified value` | Extra packages available to GHC when rebuilding xmonad. The value must be a function which receives the attribute set defined in haskellPackages as the sole argument. |
| `xsession.windowManager.xmonad.haskellPackages` | `unspecified value` | The haskellPackages used to build xmonad and other packages. This can be used to change the GHC version used to build xmonad and the packages listed in extraPackages . |
| `xsession.windowManager.xmonad.libFiles` | `attribute set of absolute path` | Additional files that will be saved in ~/.xmonad/lib/ and included in the configuration build. The keys are the file names while the values are paths to the contents of the files. |
